summary: Iteration 24: Verified ProjectionCard.jsx rewrite and core app functionality. All 6 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - login flow works, 2-tab navigation (Scan | Tracking) confirmed, no JS console errors. ProjectionCard.jsx compiles successfully with no lint errors.

POST /api/tactical/start returns session_id and welcome message
GET /api/cache/status returns valid counts (leagues, teams, players)

Frontend: Tracking tab loads with Live/History toggle and saved picks
Frontend: No React errors detected in page content

critical_code_review_comments: ProjectionCard.jsx (232 lines): Stripped-down stats visualization component - removed redundant sections (Sharp Take, Key Evidence, Scenario Analysis, Risk Factor) since tacticalBreakdown covers it all
ProjectionCard.jsx uses proper data-testid attributes for testing: projection-player-name, projection-confidence, projected-value, recommendation-banner, save-to-tracking-btn
App.js line 1853: scan-followup-input data-testid present for follow-up chat (only visible after scan prediction result)
App.js lines 2194-2206: Bottom nav correctly shows only 2 tabs (Scan and Tracking)

test_credentials.owner_email: josselj001@gmail.com (auto-login via Whop verification, access_type: Owner)

context_for_next_testing_agent: ProjectionCard.jsx was rewritten to remove redundant sections. The component now shows: player name, confidence, prop line, projected value, probability chart, match stat zones, H2H section, recommendation banner, recent samples grid, GK formula (for saves props), and matchup overview. The follow-up chat input (data-testid='scan-followup-input') only appears AFTER a scan prediction result is loaded - it won't be visible on initial page load. The app has only 2 tabs: Scan and Tracking. Tactical analysis is now embedded in the predict response as 'tacticalBreakdown' field.

verified_features.scan_tab: Upload zone with CHOOSE IMAGE button and drag-drop area
verified_features.tracking_tab: Shows saved picks with Live/History toggle, pick cards display player, team, venue, recommendation, projected value, line, confidence
verified_features.navigation: 2-tab bottom nav (Scan | Tracking) - Predict and Tactical tabs removed
verified_features.header: ReversePicks logo, API status dot, v2.1 badge, notification bell, refresh button, logout button
verified_features.projection_card: Compiles successfully, no lint errors, proper data-testid attributes
